series_metadata.series_description: Records generated from agency reviews of potential fraud by claimants who have applied for Social Security Disability benefits or are already receiving benefits. Records may include: Inspector General documents; primary review documents; queries; internet search documents; e-mail & correspondence; investigation reports, findings and analysis; and any additional record used or generated during the investigation process.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain for five (5) federal fiscal years from the date the investigation is completed then destroy. A Certificate of Disposal is required when destroying these records. ; Electronic: Retain for five (5) federal fiscal years from the date the investigation is completed then destroy. A Certificate of Disposal is required when destroying these records., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Delete
